name: zine-mcp
description: A headless zine press: exposes zine's trace-provenance gestures (Step / Send / Attest / Mint / Cite) as MCP tools, so any LLM harness writes through zine and every edit becomes a signed, traced, citable kind-4290 node.

scripts.test: tsx --test src/*.test.ts && npm run build && node dist/server.js --help
